description: Physical import-flow canary (T-6/T-3). US Census intltrade HS6/NAICS x country monthly: YoY, 3m momentum, acceleration, z vs self-history, source concentration + reshoring shift. Customs spine beneath portwatch; never names an importer.

schedule.description: Import canary — daily 13:40 UTC (Census releases monthly ~2mo lag; daily poll catches release day)
